messages.content: translate: "在加热状态下，长按暂停按键，停止训练，手套释放气体，此时手套仍然处于加热状态，满足不需要训练时，加热手部的需求。"

During the heating mode, press and hold the pause button to stop the training. The glove will release gas, while still remaining in the heating state to meet the need for heating the hands when training is not required.
translate:"通过设置键可以选择调节伸展和握紧力度级别、握/伸训练时间、单次训练时间四个选项。触摸设置键，当对应指示灯闪烁时，则表示开始调节当前选项。"

By using the setting button, you can choose to adjust the levels of stretching and gripping force, as well as the duration for gripping/extending training and each individual training session. To initiate the adjustment of the current option, touch the setting button and wait for the corresponding indicator light to flash.
translate:"当力度显示图标闪烁时，触摸将增加或减少力度级别；"
When the force display icon is flashing, touch it to increase or decrease the force level.
translate:"当握紧显示图标闪烁时，触摸可以调节握紧的训练时间；"
When the gripping display icon is flashing, touch it to adjust the training time for gripping.
translate:"当伸展显示图标闪烁时，触摸可以调节伸展的训练时间； "
When the stretching display icon is flashing, touch it to adjust the training time for stretching.
translate:"当时间显示图标闪烁时，触摸可以调节单次的训练时长。"
When the time display icon is flashing, touch it to adjust the duration of each training session.
translate:"将手套上的加热插头插入加热端口，指示灯亮，手套开始加热，触摸加热按键可以切换加热挡位，指示灯在绿色/蓝色/红色/关闭之间切换。"

Insert the heating plug on the glove into the heating port. When the indicator light turns on, the glove starts to heat up. By touching the heating button, you can switch between different heating modes indicated by the light changing between green/blue/red/off.
translate:"长按加热键可快速关闭加热功能。"
Long press the heating button to quickly disable the heating function.
translate:"触摸保存按键执行保存功能，所选手指上的灯闪烁一次，当前的参数保存成功。"
Touch the save button to execute the save function. The light on the selected finger will flash once, indicating that the current parameters have been successfully saved.
translate:"长按复位按键执行复位功能，所有手指上的灯闪烁三次，系统恢复到出厂设置。"
Long press the reset button to execute the reset function. The lights on all fingers will flash three times, indicating that the system has been restored to factory settings.
translate: "触摸手指上的按键灯,将选择/不选择训练的手指，相应灯亮表示选择此手指训练，灯不亮表示不选择此手指训练"

Touch the button light on the finger to select or deselect the training for that finger. If the corresponding light is on, it indicates that the finger is selected for training. If the light is off, it means that the finger is not selected for training.
translate:"注：产品显示屏中的图片所示为右手手掌朝上的示意图，如果是左手，选择和右手是一一对应关系）。"
Note: The images displayed on the product screen are illustrations of the right hand with the palm facing up. If it is the left hand, the selection and right hand correspond to each other.
translate:"必须至少选择一个手指进行训练，即至少一个手指上对应的灯亮。"
It is necessary to select at least one finger for training, which means at least one corresponding light on a finger should be turned on.
translate:"防干扰模式下，大拇指训练不可以取消，其余四个手指至少选择一个手指同时训练。"
In the anti-interference mode, the training for the thumb cannot be canceled. For the remaining four fingers, at least one finger must be selected for simultaneous training.
translate:"额定充电电压"
Rated charging voltage.
translate:"加热最大功率"
Maximum heating power.
translate:"主机工作电压"
Operating voltage of the main unit.
translate:“主机工作电流”
Operating current of the main unit.
translate:"康复手套(带加热线)"
Rehabilitation gloves (with heating wires).
translate:"特别说明"
Special Note.
translate:"规格，产品外观，颜色，功能和产品附件如有变化，不会提前通知，以实际产品为准。"
Specifications, product appearance, color, functionality, and product accessories are subject to change without prior notice. Please refer to the actual product for accuracy.
